description: risk-assessor produces a risk matrix with likelihood × impact scoring and mitigations.

cases.prompt: Assess risks for this change: 'Migrating our user auth from session cookies to JWTs, storing refresh tokens in localStorage, and rolling out to 100% of traffic on Friday.'
cases.notes: Change has real security + rollout risks. Agent should flag both and propose mitigations.

cases.prompt: Assess risks for this change: 'Updating the README to fix a typo.'
cases.notes: Trivial change. Agent must not invent risks.
